holdings.infoBox: PINK is an equity ETF with a total of 53 individual holdings. The top holdings are PureCycle Technologies stock at 7.88%, United Therapeutics at 7.33%, Novo Nordisk at 6.52%, UnitedHealth Group at 6.00%, and Eli Lilly and Company at 5.87%.

overview.description: The Simplify Health Care ETF (PINK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of US healthcare stocks and/or ETFs. The fund seeks long-term capital growth and commits to donate its net profit, in the form of its annual management fee to the Susan G PINK was launched on Oct 7, 2021 and is issued by Simplify.
